task_completion.description: Verify that a sample project (.wpa) is loaded into QBlade.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade is open and the title bar, recent files menu, or project tree indicates a project file from /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/ is loaded.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Airfoil Design module is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Airfoil Design' module is selected in the QBlade top toolbar or module menu, showing the airfoil plotting interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent generates a NACA 0015 airfoil.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'NACA Foil' generation dialog is visible with '0015' entered, or a symmetric airfoil is plotted in the main view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the NACA 0015 airfoil is added to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'NACA 0015' is listed in the project tree/dock on the left side of the QBlade interface under the airfoils section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the modified project is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Project' or 'Save As' dialog shows the path /home/ga/Documents/projects/ and filename 'my_turbine.wpa', OR the QBlade window title bar updates to 'my_turbine.wpa'.

integrity.description: Check that the agent interacted with the QBlade GUI to make modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, dialog boxes, and menu interactions within the QBlade application, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Check that the airfoil was genuinely generated in QBlade.
integrity.visual_evidence: The NACA 0015 airfoil was created using the Airfoil Design module's generation tool, rather than just renaming an existing item in the project tree.

integrity.description: Check that the agent didn't just copy and rename the file in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to execute a 'cp' command to bypass the GUI and simply duplicate a sample project to the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output filename is 'my_turbine.wpa' and it must be saved in /home/ga/Documents/projects/. The task requires adding a NACA 0015 airfoil (a symmetric airfoil with 15% thickness) using QBlade's Airfoil Design module. The sample projects are located in /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/.
